summary: A Fox News interview with Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons. He says Chicago protesters are advocating for hardened criminals (TdA members, child rapists, fentanyl dealers), shown with Broadview, IL protest and arrest b-roll. The segment is a broadcast news interview with no music.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; 'ILLINOIS GOV DEFIES TRUMP CALLS FOR ARREST'; 'Todd Lyons | Acting I.C.E. Director'
